name: Patent Similarity Agent
description: Finds similar or overlapping patents for a given invention description. Uses search and overlap evaluation. Input: patent text, abstract, or invention description. Output: list of similar patents with titles, numbers, links, and overlap analysis. Not legal advice.

skills.name: search_similar_patents
skills.description: Search for patents or similar prior art matching the query (keywords, abstract, or invention description). Returns titles, snippets, and links.

skills.name: evaluate_patent_overlap
skills.description: Evaluate how much candidate patents overlap with or are similar to a given patent summary. Returns overlap analysis.
